target.sql_fulltext: select SUM(P__0),inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17 from (select SUM(a.GRANULARITYPERIOD) P__0 ,a.X2INTERFACE_ID par0, :1 par1, k.PEERIP par2, k.PEERENODEB par3, l.SITE_TYPE par4, l.SITE_OPERATOR par5, l.SITE_VENDOR par6, l.SITE_VERSION par7, :2 par8, a.ENODEB_NAME par9, l.ENODEB_CN par10, l.ENODEB_IBGE_ID par11, l.ENODEB_LATITUDE par12, l.ENODEB_LONGITUDE par13, l.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY par14, l.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD par15, l.ENODEB_REGION par16, l.ENODEB_UF par17 from DBN0_HUA_RAN.T1526726696 a, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.ENR_RADIO_4G_HUA_X2INTERFACE k, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.ENR_RADIO_4G_ENODEB l where a.ENODEB_NAME = k.ENODEB_NAME AND a.X2INTERFACE_ID = k.INTERFACEID AND a.ENODEB_NAME = l.MOBILE_SITE_NAME AND a.OBJECT = l.NE_NAME AND a.RESULTTIME>=to_date(:3 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND a.RESULTTIME<to_date(:4 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND l.STARTTIME>=to_date(:5 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND l.STARTTIME<to_date(:6 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') group by a.ENODEB_NAME, a.OBJECT, a.X2INTERFACE_ID, l.ENODEB_CN, l.ENODEB_IBGE_ID, l.ENODEB_LATITUDE, l.ENODEB_LONGITUDE, l.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY, l.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD, l.ENODEB_REGION, l.ENODEB_UF, l.ERB_FISICA, l.ID_MASTER, k.PEERENODEB, k.PEERIP, l.SITE_OPERATOR, l.SITE_TYPE, l.SITE_VENDOR, l.SITE_VERSION, l.STATION_CODE, k.X2CPBEARERID) inner_select group by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17 order by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17

sql_monitor_report.error: ORA-01013: user requested cancel of current operation

stat.name: Total Number of Rowsets
stat.desc: Total number of rowsets received from underlying input

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Storage Aggregation
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging storage aggregation pushdown

stat.name: Slow metadata bytes
stat.desc: Size of slow metadata in bytes

stat.name: SI saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by storage index

stat.name: Flash cache bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes fetched from flash cache

stat.name: Partial flash cache and disk bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes where IO was partially fetched from flash cache and disk

stat.name: Columnar cache saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by columnar cache

stat.name: Dynamic Scan Tasks on Thread
stat.desc: Number of dynamic scan tasks completed by thread
